note: Golden host<->worker fixtures (SRS §6.3-6.4). Iterated by both the TS and Python test suites. direction: h2w (host->worker), w2h (worker->host), tree (bare component tree).

fixtures.desc: Column with Text, Slider (on_change handler h0) and Button (on_click handler h1)
Canvas exercising all eight draw ops and an on_pointer handler
Load a Python item with params and a seed
Reply to LOAD_ITEM with item meta
Unsolicited render carrying a component tree and seq
User fired handler token h0 with a numeric value
